details: Chhattisgarh "Medhaavee Chhaatr/ Chhaatra Shiksha Protsaahan Yojana" has been started by the Government of Chhattisgarh and operated by the Labor Department of Chhattisgarh. Benefits will be provided to applicants studying in 10th, 12th, graduation, post graduation, and some selected courses.
benefits: All vocational education and professional education
By Chhattisgarh Board of Secondary Education. For the boys and girls who are in the top ten of merit in the state level examination of class 10th and 12th held

Government ITI, IIT, Engineering, Medical, Law, Dental, and Nursing. For the students taking admission in the college (This facility will also be provided to the children of the beneficiaries taking admission in the above streams in non-government institutions at the rate applicable in the government institution)

The admission fee of each academic session, all academic fees, expenses incurred on hostel accommodation and food will be reimbursed by the Board and every year Rs 2000 will be paid separately by the Board for copy-books and stationery.
eligibility: Applicant should be resident of Chhattisgarh.
First two children from a family
Those children who score more than 75 percent marks will get the benefit of the scheme.
Beneficiaries will be eligible for the benefits of this scheme after 90 days of registration.

offline: Registered construction workers can apply through any CSC center or labor office.

documents_required: Marksheet of the student in the previous year's class.
Certificate issued by the Principal of studying in the current session.

faqs.question: What is this scheme?
faqs.answer: Chhattisgarh state Government started a scheme "Medhavi Chhatr/ Chhatra Shiksha Protsahan Yojana" for education.

faqs.question: What is the benefits of the scheme?
What is the eligibility criteria ?
faqs.answer: 1. The benefit of the scheme will be given to the first two children of registered factory workers of the state. 2. Among the first two children of registered workers, those children who score more than 75 percent marks will get the benefit of the scheme. 3. Beneficiaries will be eligible for the benefits of this scheme after 90 days of registration.

faqs.question: For how many children can the applicant avail the benefit of this scheme?
What is the marks eligibility criteria in previous class to get scholarship?
faqs.answer: Those children who score more than 75 percent marks will get the benefit of the scheme.

faqs.question: For which classes/course student will get the scholarship?
faqs.answer: Students will get the scholarship from class 1st 12th, Graduation, Post Graduation and some selected courses.

faqs.question: How to apply for the scholarship?
faqs.answer: The registered construction worker can submit the online application through labor office of the concerned area.

faqs.question: What documents are required ?
faqs.answer: 1. Labor Registration Certificate (Guardian). 2. Aadhar card. 3. Bank account details. 4. Permanent residence certificate. 5. Marksheet of the student in the previous year's class. 6. Certificate issued by the Principal of studying in the current session.

faqs.question: Will the student get scholarship every month?
faqs.answer: No, The amount will be payable in lump sum annually.

faqs.question: May working person also apply for this scheme ?
faqs.answer: No, this scholarship is only for students.
